test-case.description: invokes orchestrator only for workload and mode entries with desired delta
test-case.name: Dashboard Phase 3 Commit Engine.invokes orchestrator only for workload and mode entries with desired delta

test-case.description: toggles Active/Inactive for non-mixed current state
test-case.name: Dashboard Phase 3 Desired-State Toggle.toggles Active/Inactive for non-mixed current state

test-case.description: toggles only Active/Inactive when current state is Mixed
test-case.name: Dashboard Phase 3 Desired-State Toggle.toggles only Active/Inactive when current state is Mixed

test-case.description: allows toggling when current and desired are empty
test-case.name: Dashboard Phase 3 Desired-State Toggle.allows toggling when current and desired are empty

test-case.description: renders empty state text without throwing
test-case.name: Dashboard Phase 3 Desired-State Toggle.renders empty state text without throwing

test-case.description: hides Inactive text in Tab 2 display
test-case.name: Dashboard Phase 3 Desired-State Toggle.hides Inactive text in Tab 2 display

test-case.description: harvests post-change and action-specific messages from System_Modes path
test-case.name: Dashboard Phase 3 Post-Commit Messaging.harvests post-change and action-specific messages from System_Modes path

test-case.description: harvests hardware post-stop message from Hardware_Definitions path
test-case.name: Dashboard Phase 3 Post-Commit Messaging.harvests hardware post-stop message from Hardware_Definitions path

test-case.description: returns empty messages when UIStates is empty
test-case.name: Dashboard Phase 3 Post-Commit Messaging.returns empty messages when UIStates is empty

test-case.description: toggles ON and OFF desired state for manual hardware override rows
test-case.name: Dashboard Tab 3 Manual Override Console.toggles ON and OFF desired state for manual hardware override rows

test-case.description: marks pending manual override rows with pending color and state
test-case.name: Dashboard Tab 3 Manual Override Console.marks pending manual override rows with pending color and state

test-case.description: commits hardware override rows through Hardware_Override profile type
test-case.name: Dashboard Tab 3 Manual Override Console.commits hardware override rows through Hardware_Override profile type

test-case.description: persists active system mode intent to state json
test-case.name: Dashboard Tab 3 Manual Override Console.persists active system mode intent to state json

test-case.description: bootstraps state json when missing
test-case.name: Dashboard Tab 3 Manual Override Console.bootstraps state json when missing

test-case.description: queues ideal targets for compliance violations only
test-case.name: Dashboard Tab 2/3 Queue Workflow.queues ideal targets for compliance violations only

test-case.description: toggles queue entry state between ON and OFF
test-case.name: Dashboard Tab 2/3 Queue Workflow.toggles queue entry state between ON and OFF

test-case.description: clears queue entry for selected component
test-case.name: Dashboard Tab 2/3 Queue Workflow.clears queue entry for selected component

test-case.description: shows queued row with queued status and yellow color
test-case.name: Dashboard Tab 2/3 Queue Workflow.shows queued row with queued status and yellow color

test-case.description: shows blueprint target in Desired for non-queued violation rows
test-case.name: Dashboard Tab 2/3 Queue Workflow.shows blueprint target in Desired for non-queued violation rows

test-case.description: normalizes ANY targets to empty Desired by default
test-case.name: Dashboard Tab 2/3 Queue Workflow.normalizes ANY targets to empty Desired by default

test-case.description: keeps Desired tied to blueprint target even when queued differs
test-case.name: Dashboard Tab 2/3 Queue Workflow.keeps Desired tied to blueprint target even when queued differs

test-case.description: uses compact symbols for compliant and ignored rows
test-case.name: Dashboard Tab 2/3 Queue Workflow.uses compact symbols for compliant and ignored rows

test-case.description: renders unified footer layout across all tabs
test-case.name: Dashboard Tab 2/3 Queue Workflow.renders unified footer layout across all tabs

test-case.description: renders tab 4 footer as context-aware by selected row
test-case.name: Dashboard Tab 2/3 Queue Workflow.renders tab 4 footer as context-aware by selected row

test-case.description: sets active blueprint immediately and updates mode rows
test-case.name: Dashboard Tab 2/3 Queue Workflow.sets active blueprint immediately and updates mode rows

test-case.description: returns settings as active array for tab 4
test-case.name: Dashboard Tab 4 Settings.returns settings as active array for tab 4

test-case.description: builds tab 4 rows with section separator and action rows
test-case.name: Dashboard Tab 4 Settings.builds tab 4 rows with section separator and action rows

test-case.description: loads configured settings rows and provides descriptions
test-case.name: Dashboard Tab 4 Settings.loads configured settings rows and provides descriptions

test-case.description: reports startup logo disabled only when _config.disable_startup_logo is true
test-case.name: Dashboard Tab 4 Settings.reports startup logo disabled only when _config.disable_startup_logo is true

test-case.description: toggles bool and cycles choice on space
test-case.name: Dashboard Tab 4 Settings.toggles bool and cycles choice on space

test-case.description: updates numeric setting with floor validation
test-case.name: Dashboard Tab 4 Settings.updates numeric setting with floor validation

test-case.description: parses Enter-input for integer settings with clamping
test-case.name: Dashboard Tab 4 Settings.parses Enter-input for integer settings with clamping

test-case.description: saves selected settings rows and preserves unknown config keys
test-case.name: Dashboard Tab 4 Settings.saves selected settings rows and preserves unknown config keys

test-case.description: global interceptor reset disables setting and commits sync-only cleanup
test-case.name: Dashboard Tab 4 Settings.global interceptor reset disables setting and commits sync-only cleanup

test-case.description: kills only interceptor helper shell processes during emergency cleanup
test-case.name: Dashboard Tab 4 Settings.kills only interceptor helper shell processes during emergency cleanup

test-case.description: marks settings row as pending when desired differs from current
test-case.name: Dashboard Tab 4 Settings.marks settings row as pending when desired differs from current

test-case.description: does not treat action rows as pending settings rows
test-case.name: Dashboard Tab 4 Settings.does not treat action rows as pending settings rows

test-case.description: shows confirm text only when action is armed
test-case.name: Dashboard Tab 4 Settings.shows confirm text only when action is armed

test-case.description: requires Enter twice to execute a tab 4 action row
test-case.name: Dashboard Tab 4 Settings.requires Enter twice to execute a tab 4 action row

test-case.description: blocks action execution when there are pending setting changes
test-case.name: Dashboard Tab 4 Settings.blocks action execution when there are pending setting changes

test-case.description: dispatches Reset_Interceptors action through action dispatcher
test-case.name: Dashboard Tab 4 Settings.dispatches Reset_Interceptors action through action dispatcher

test-case.description: requires non-empty value for shortcut prefix settings
test-case.name: Dashboard Tab 4 Settings.requires non-empty value for shortcut prefix settings

test-case.description: applies string edit input with non-empty validation rules
test-case.name: Dashboard Tab 4 Settings.applies string edit input with non-empty validation rules

test-case.description: builds commit states from workload deltas and queued hardware only
test-case.name: Dashboard Commit Scope Rules.builds commit states from workload deltas and queued hardware only

test-case.description: clears pending hardware queue after commit helper runs
test-case.name: Dashboard Commit Scope Rules.clears pending hardware queue after commit helper runs

test-case.description: runs sync-only orchestrator path when there are no pending states
test-case.name: Dashboard Commit Scope Rules.runs sync-only orchestrator path when there are no pending states

test-case.description: persists queued settings during commit
test-case.name: Dashboard Commit Scope Rules.persists queued settings during commit

test-case.description: Office-only workload activation does not schedule mode hardware operations
test-case.name: Dashboard scope-gated sequencer (integrated).Office-only workload activation does not schedule mode hardware operations

test-case.description: prints intent sections and detailed tasks instead of phase-number lines
test-case.name: Dashboard scope-gated sequencer (integrated).prints intent sections and detailed tasks instead of phase-number lines

test-case.description: transitions visible task status from pending to running to done
test-case.name: Dashboard scope-gated sequencer (integrated).transitions visible task status from pending to running to done

test-case.description: shows running marker during execution and done marker after execution
test-case.name: Dashboard scope-gated sequencer (integrated).shows running marker during execution and done marker after execution

test-case.description: falls back to append rendering when cursor redraw is unavailable
test-case.name: Dashboard scope-gated sequencer (integrated).falls back to append rendering when cursor redraw is unavailable

test-case.description: cycles detail mode in the expected order
test-case.name: Dashboard Workload Detail Modes.cycles detail mode in the expected order

test-case.description: toggles detail mode only on workload tab when tilde is pressed
test-case.name: Dashboard Workload Detail Modes.toggles detail mode only on workload tab when tilde is pressed

test-case.description: renders details by mode rules
test-case.name: Dashboard Workload Detail Modes.renders details by mode rules

test-case.description: builds compact detail rows with svc/exe labels and runtime flags
test-case.name: Dashboard Workload Detail Modes.builds compact detail rows with svc/exe labels and runtime flags

test-case.description: formats mixed status with check counts only for mixed rows
test-case.name: Dashboard Workload Detail Modes.formats mixed status with check counts only for mixed rows

test-case.description: includes detail mode hint in tab 1 footer only
test-case.name: Dashboard Workload Detail Modes.includes detail mode hint in tab 1 footer only

test-case.description: pads short domain names to 8 characters inside brackets
test-case.name: Dashboard Workload Group Label Formatting.pads short domain names to 8 characters inside brackets

test-case.description: truncates long domain names to 8 characters inside brackets
test-case.name: Dashboard Workload Group Label Formatting.truncates long domain names to 8 characters inside brackets

test-case.description: falls back to plain name when domain is empty
test-case.name: Dashboard Workload Group Label Formatting.falls back to plain name when domain is empty

test-case.description: filters workloads by domain, favorites, mixed, and search query
test-case.name: Dashboard Workload Filtering and Viewport.filters workloads by domain, favorites, mixed, and search query

test-case.description: hides hidden workloads unless query explicitly matches
test-case.name: Dashboard Workload Filtering and Viewport.hides hidden workloads unless query explicitly matches

test-case.description: returns viewport range centered around cursor when possible
test-case.name: Dashboard Workload Filtering and Viewport.returns viewport range centered around cursor when possible

test-case.description: cycles domain filter across all groups and back to all
test-case.name: Dashboard Workload Filtering and Viewport.cycles domain filter across all groups and back to all

test-case.description: uses Exit as the default commit mode
test-case.name: Dashboard Commit Return Mode.uses Exit as the default commit mode

test-case.description: toggles commit mode between Exit and Return
test-case.name: Dashboard Commit Return Mode.toggles commit mode between Exit and Return

test-case.description: formats commit mode indicator text
test-case.name: Dashboard Commit Return Mode.formats commit mode indicator text

test-case.description: includes commit mode text in tab footer output
test-case.name: Dashboard Commit Return Mode.includes commit mode text in tab footer output

test-case.description: returns Exit immediately when commit mode is Exit
test-case.name: Dashboard Commit Return Mode.returns Exit immediately when commit mode is Exit

test-case.description: returns ReturnToDashboard when commit mode is Return and non-escape key is pressed
test-case.name: Dashboard Commit Return Mode.returns ReturnToDashboard when commit mode is Return and non-escape key is pressed

test-case.description: returns Exit when commit mode is Return and escape key is pressed
test-case.name: Dashboard Commit Return Mode.returns Exit when commit mode is Return and escape key is pressed

test-case.description: keeps commit sequence intact in Return mode
test-case.name: Dashboard Commit Return Mode.keeps commit sequence intact in Return mode
